title: Alien Evo Plumbers Addon
description: This Plumber Addon adds Plumber suits, tools, and much more to the Alien Evo mod.
body:
### Alien Evo Plumbers v1.0.0
Features:
- Plumber V1 Suit is available
- Press "X" with Full Plumber V1 Set to use your ability
- Master Control Tablet is now craftable
- Self Destruction Tablet is now craftable


Requirements:
[Alien Evo](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
